all.en: Dear Ms. Anderson, thank you for choosing the Riverside Grand Hotel.
all.zh: Anderson 女士您好，感謝您選擇 Riverside Grand Hotel。

all.en: We are pleased to confirm your reservation for your upcoming stay.
all.zh: 我們很高興為您確認即將到來的住宿訂房。

all.en: Your confirmation number is RGH-58271, valid for all future correspondence.
all.zh: 您的訂房確認編號為 RGH-58271，後續聯絡均適用。

all.en: Check-in is scheduled for Monday, June 9, from 3:00 p.m. onward.
all.zh: 入住時間為六月九日（週一）下午三點起。

all.en: Check-out time is 11:00 a.m. on Thursday, June 12.
all.zh: 退房時間為六月十二日（週四）上午十一點。

all.en: You have booked a Deluxe King Room with a river-facing view.
all.zh: 您已預訂一間面河景觀的豪華大床房。

all.en: The room includes a private balcony, work desk, and complimentary high-speed internet.
all.zh: 客房內備有私人陽台、辦公桌及免費高速網路。

all.en: Daily breakfast for two guests is also included in your booking.
all.zh: 您的訂房亦包含每日兩人份早餐。

all.en: Breakfast is served at the Aurora Restaurant from 6:30 to 10:30 a.m.
all.zh: 早餐於 Aurora 餐廳供應，時間為上午六點三十分至十點三十分。

all.en: The total cost for three nights is 786 US dollars, including all taxes.
all.zh: 三晚住宿總費用為 786 美元，含所有稅金。

all.en: A credit card guarantee has been received and no charge has been processed yet.
all.zh: 我們已收到信用卡擔保資訊，目前尚未實際扣款。

all.en: Full payment will be settled upon check-out at the front desk.
all.zh: 全額費用將於退房時於櫃台結清。

all.en: Cancellations are accepted free of charge until 6:00 p.m. on June 7.
all.zh: 六月七日下午六點前皆可免費取消訂房。

all.en: After this deadline, the first night will be charged to your credit card.
all.zh: 逾期後將自您信用卡收取首晚房費。

all.en: Our hotel offers complimentary access to the rooftop pool and fitness center.
all.zh: 本飯店提供頂樓泳池與健身中心的免費使用權。

all.en: Spa services and in-room massages can be booked through guest services.
all.zh: Spa 服務及客房按摩可透過賓客服務預約。

all.en: If you need airport transportation, please contact us at least 12 hours ahead.
all.zh: 如需機場接送服務，請至少提前 12 小時與我們聯繫。

all.en: Our private car service is available at a flat rate of 65 dollars.
all.zh: 本飯店的專車服務採固定價格 65 美元收費。

all.en: Early check-in or late check-out is subject to availability on the day.
all.zh: 提前入住或延後退房需視當日房況而定。

all.en: Please notify us in advance if you wish to request either service.
all.zh: 若您希望申請其中任一服務，請提前告知我們。

all.en: Should you have specific requests, kindly reply to this email at your convenience.
all.zh: 若您有任何特殊需求，請隨時回覆此封郵件。

all.en: Our concierge team is available 24 hours a day to assist with local recommendations.
all.zh: 我們的禮賓團隊每日 24 小時提供當地推薦的協助。

all.en: We are committed to making your stay both comfortable and memorable.
all.zh: 我們致力於讓您的住宿既舒適又難忘。

all.en: Once again, thank you for your reservation, and we look forward to welcoming you.
all.zh: 再次感謝您的訂房，期待屆時歡迎您的蒞臨。

all.en: Loyalty members earn double points on every weekday stay throughout the current quarter.
all.zh: 會員於本季平日入住可獲得雙倍點數。

all.en: Our business center provides free printing, scanning, and meeting room booking services.
all.zh: 本飯店商務中心提供免費列印、掃描及會議室預約服務。

all.en: Complimentary bottled water and a welcome fruit basket will be placed in your room.
all.zh: 客房內將為您備妥免費瓶裝水及迎賓水果籃。

all.en: Pet-friendly accommodations are available upon request with a small daily cleaning fee.
all.zh: 可應要求安排寵物友善客房，每日酌收少額清潔費用。

all.en: Our executive lounge offers evening cocktails for guests staying on the upper floors.
all.zh: 本飯店行政貴賓廳於晚間為高樓層住客提供雞尾酒款待。

all.en: Self-parking is included with your booking, while valet service incurs an additional charge.
all.zh: 您的訂房包含自助停車服務，代客泊車則另行收費。

all.en: Local tours and theatre tickets can be arranged through our concierge desk in the lobby.
all.zh: 當地觀光行程與劇院門票可透過大廳禮賓櫃台代為安排。

all.en: A printed itinerary of nearby restaurants will be left in your room upon arrival.
all.zh: 您抵達時，客房內將備有鄰近餐廳的紙本介紹資訊。

all.en: Sustainable housekeeping programs are available for guests who wish to reuse linens daily.
all.zh: 希望每日重複使用備品的旅客可參與我們的永續客房整理計畫。

all.en: Warm regards from the reservations team at the Riverside Grand Hotel.
all.zh: Riverside Grand Hotel 訂房團隊敬上。

all.en: Mobile check-in becomes available through our hotel application starting twenty-four hours before arrival.
all.zh: 您可於抵達前二十四小時起透過本飯店行動應用程式辦理行動入住。

all.en: Our digital room key feature allows guests to access their rooms directly using their smartphone.
all.zh: 本飯店數位房卡功能讓賓客可直接使用手機進入客房。

all.en: Conference and banquet facilities accommodate corporate groups of up to two hundred delegates on site.
all.zh: 本飯店會議與宴會設施可容納最多兩百名企業團體與會代表。

all.en: Guests staying three or more nights receive a complimentary in-room dining credit during their visit.
all.zh: 連續住宿三晚以上的賓客可享有住宿期間的免費客房餐飲抵用金。

all.en: Our resident pianist performs live music in the lobby lounge every evening from seven o'clock.
all.zh: 本飯店駐館鋼琴家每晚七點起於大廳酒廊現場演奏。

all.en: Twenty-four hour room service offers a thoughtfully curated late-night menu for guests dining privately.
all.zh: 全日客房服務提供精心規劃的深夜菜單，供賓客在房內用餐。

all.en: Children under twelve years of age stay free when sharing existing bedding with accompanying parents.
all.zh: 十二歲以下兒童與父母同床住宿可享免費入住。

all.en: An on-site florist can arrange custom bouquets to be delivered to your room upon request.
all.zh: 本飯店駐館花藝師可依需求製作客製花束送至客房。

all.en: Our environmental program has eliminated single-use plastic toiletries throughout all guest accommodations.
all.zh: 本飯店環保計畫已全面取消客房內的一次性塑膠盥洗用品。

all.en: Thank you for choosing us, and please contact our concierge team for any further assistance.
all.zh: 感謝您的選擇，如需任何進一步協助請聯繫我們的禮賓團隊。

all.en: I always pack lighter when I know the hotel has a good gym, since I never use mine at home anyway.
all.zh: 如果飯店健身房不錯我就會少帶東西，反正我家那台跑步機從來沒在用。

all.en: My wife and I requested a room on a higher floor, mostly so we could see the city at night.
all.zh: 我跟我太太指定要高樓層的房間，主要是為了晚上看城市夜景。

all.en: Have you ever ordered room service at midnight just because you were too tired to find a restaurant?
all.zh: 你有沒有試過半夜叫客房服務，只因為累到完全不想找餐廳？

all.en: Last time I forgot my charger and the front desk had a basket of spare cables ready to lend me.
all.zh: 上次我忘記帶充電線，櫃台居然有一籃備用線可以借我。

all.en: My kids treated the elevator like an amusement park ride and pressed every single button on the way down.
all.zh: 我家小孩把電梯當成遊樂設施，下樓時把每一顆按鈕都按了一遍。

all.en: I usually skip the included breakfast since I would rather sleep in than fight crowds at the buffet.
all.zh: 我通常會跳過附的早餐，因為我寧願多睡一下，也不想跟一堆人擠自助餐區。

all.en: Honestly, the welcome fruit basket made my mother feel so spoiled that she still talks about it months later.
all.zh: 說真的，那個迎賓水果籃讓我媽覺得備受寵愛，幾個月後她還在唸個不停。

all.en: My boss prefers self-parking because he hates strangers driving his car, even if it is just a rental.
all.zh: 我老闆都選自助停車，因為他不喜歡別人開他的車，即使只是租來的。

all.en: I forgot to check out online and almost missed my flight while waiting in line at the front desk.
all.zh: 我忘了線上退房，差點因為排櫃台排到錯過班機。

all.en: My favorite part of any hotel stay is honestly the moment you finally collapse onto the freshly made bed.
all.zh: 我覺得住飯店最棒的時刻，就是終於癱在剛鋪好的床上那一瞬間。
